title: ALTER TABLE corrupts DESC indexes
poc: CREATE INDEX t1a ON t1(a DESC);
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD COLUMN d;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE changes schema version affecting DESC indexes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT, c REAL, d INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
CREATE INDEX t1a ON t1(a DESC);
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD COLUMN e TEXT;
